nasb.text: Moses was educated in all the learning of the Egyptians, and he was a man of power in words and deeds.

esv.text: And Moses was instructed in all the wisdom of the Egyptians, and he was mighty in his words and deeds.

cnv.text: 摩西學盡了埃及人的一切學問，說話行事都有能力。

ccb.text: “摩西学会了埃及人一切的学问，成为一个说话办事很有能力的人。

csbs.text: 摩西在埃及人的一切智慧上受了教育，说话行事都有能力。
